mapper.select: select deptcode, deptname, status from cotdl.tbl_department order by deptcode
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_department (deptcode, deptname, status) values (#{deptcode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
insert into cotdl.tbl_department (deptcode, deptname, status) values (#{deptcode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
select deptcode, deptname, status from cotdl.tbl_department
order by deptcode limit #{offset}, #{amount}
